'''Barseg''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

==History==
An ancient world that ruled a small space empire long before the foundation of the [[Kingdom of Cron]] on [[Cadinth]], prior to [[25,150 BBY]]. Barseg was the capital world of one of the oldest Tion Cluster states: the [[Kingdom of Barseg]]. Barseg later allied with the Kingdoms of [[Kingdom of Cadinth|Cadinth]] and [[Kingdom of Jaminere|Jaminere]], creating the [[Three Allied Kingdoms]]. [[Pirate King/Legends|Pirate King]] [[Xer VIII]] waged a campaign against the kingdoms between 25,150 BBY and [[25,130 BBY]], defeating the Kingdom of Barseg at the [[Battle of Barseg]]. Barseg and the Three Allied Kingdoms worlds were conquered and absorbed into [[Kingdom of Cron|Xer's Empire]], and later into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] until its collapse in [[25,100 BBY]]. After the [[Tionese War]], Barseg and the entire Tion Cluster were absorbed in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Kingdom of Barseg surviving.<ref name="Xim Week" />

Barseg enslaved the neighboring world [[Lorrad]] for millennia, forcing the Lorradians to live in miserable conditions. The planet was freed when the Republic subjugated Barseg around [[300 BBY/Legends|300 BBY]], but the planet maintained its economic domination over Lorrad.<ref name="Xim Week" /> The Kingdom of Barseg long included [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. The Lianna providences of [[Caldara]] and [[Berene]] led the last great independence war on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] against Barseg, which resulted in the annihilation of both provinces. The plight of Lianna was ignored by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] until the Senate itself took control of Lianna from Barseg in 300 BBY.

In the Republic's final years, the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] worlds joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]], and were later subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that created the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]]. The Barsegi were known for their arrogance and pride in their ancient imperial past. The planet was known for its incredibly rigid caste system, and even by the time of the Empire, many on the grim tradeworld performed the same duties their distant ancestors did.<ref name="Xim Week" />
